grafana.workspace.assertionattributes.Cf: A structure that defines which attributes in the IdP assertion are to be used to define information about the users authenticated by the IdP to use the workspace.

grafana.workspace.assertionattributes.Em.Description: The name of the attribute within the SAML assertion to use as the email names for SAML users.

grafana.workspace.assertionattributes.Gr.Description: The name of the attribute within the SAML assertion to use as the user full "friendly" names for user groups.

grafana.workspace.assertionattributes.Lo.Description: The name of the attribute within the SAML assertion to use as the login names for SAML users.

grafana.workspace.assertionattributes.Na.Description: The name of the attribute within the SAML assertion to use as the user full "friendly" names for SAML users.

grafana.workspace.assertionattributes.Or.Description: The name of the attribute within the SAML assertion to use as the user full "friendly" names for the users' organizations.

grafana.workspace.assertionattributes.Ro.Description: The name of the attribute within the SAML assertion to use as the user roles.
